query:
CREATE TABLE `puzzles` (
  `id` varchar(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  `fen` text NOT NULL,
  `moves` text NOT NULL,
  `rating` int,
  `themes` text NOT NULL,
  `color` varchar(10),
  `openingName` varchar(255),
  `openingVariation` varchar(255),
  `puzzleData` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_rating` (`rating`),
  INDEX `idx_color` (`color`),
  INDEX `idx_opening` (`openingName`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute CREATE TABLE `puzzles` (
  `id` varchar(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  `fen` text NOT NULL,
  `moves` text NOT NULL,
  `rating` int,
  `themes` text NOT NULL,
  `color` varchar(10),
  `openingName` varchar(255),
  `openingVariation` varchar(255),
  `puzzleData` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_rating` (`rating`),
  INDEX `idx_color` (`color`),
  INDEX `idx_opening` (`openingName`)
);
